extraction_notes: Compiled Amazon's three-segment structure (North America, International, AWS) with segment-level customer types and channels. Preserved offering hierarchies including Electronic Devices (Kindle, Fire, Echo, Ring, Blink, eero), AWS Cloud Services (Compute, Storage, Database, Analytics, AI/ML), Advertising Services (Sponsored, Display, Video), and Content Publishing Programs (Twitch). Revenue models attached to specific offerings where explicitly stated. Geographic scope set to Worldwide. No partner relationships materialized per memo.
